programme.title: WHEN GUE MARRIED MENDADAK
programme.desc: Inside the ambulance, Hera held her father Pak Dirga's hand as he lay in critical condition. Hera cried continuously while asking the driver to speed up. Pak Dirga had suffered a heart attack. Meanwhile, Robi, Hera's boyfriend, a band vocalist, was forced to leave the concert even though his band was about to perform as the opening act for a foreign band. Robi chose to accompany Hera, who was surely panicking. The other members of Robi's band were upset, especially Desti, the band's bassist.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 119
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ikan Hiu Makan Badak I Love You Mendadak
programme.desc: Nita has a boyfriend who she really likes and whose name is Beni. However, Nita suspects that her boyfriend is cheating on her. On the other hand, there is a man named Bagas (Ridho Illahi) who has a girlfriend named Mona. Bagas suspects that Mona has another man. One day he caught Mona making out with another man. Bagas was shocked to find out that Mona's affair was Nita's boyfriend. Bagas immediately went to see Nita. After meeting Nita, Bagas initially did not want to tell Nita first.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 573
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 67
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: WHEN GUE MARRIED MENDADAK
programme.desc: Inside the ambulance, Hera held her father Pak Dirga's hand as he lay in critical condition. Hera cried continuously while asking the driver to speed up. Pak Dirga had suffered a heart attack. Meanwhile, Robi, Hera's boyfriend, a band vocalist, was forced to leave the concert even though his band was about to perform as the opening act for a foreign band. Robi chose to accompany Hera, who was surely panicking. The other members of Robi's band were upset, especially Desti, the band's bassist.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 119
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Ikan Hiu Makan Badak I Love You Mendadak
programme.desc: Nita has a boyfriend who she really likes and whose name is Beni. However, Nita suspects that her boyfriend is cheating on her. On the other hand, there is a man named Bagas (Ridho Illahi) who has a girlfriend named Mona. Bagas suspects that Mona has another man. One day he caught Mona making out with another man. Bagas was shocked to find out that Mona's affair was Nita's boyfriend. Bagas immediately went to see Nita. After meeting Nita, Bagas initially did not want to tell Nita first.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 573
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 67
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Bos Galak Kesabaran Setipis Tisu
programme.desc: Radit (Cakrawala Airawan) is upset because his grandmother demands him to find a life partner. On the other hand, Sherina (Hana Saraswati) is surprised to learn that there is a selection to become her boss's girlfriend, but she feels inappropriate because of her ordinary appearance. Then, Radit's younger sister asks Sherina to become a beautiful woman and date Radit so that Radit falls in love with her. Sherina, who needed money, finally accepted Radit's younger sister's offer.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 119
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Hati Abang Satpol PP Dibadutin Jangan
programme.desc: Regina (Indah Nicole) who works as a clown. Regina does the job because it is the only skill she has and it is easy to do without the need for higher education. One day when Regina was performing in the city crowd, a group of Satpol PP came and raided the streets. Regina panicked when she was chased by one of the handsome Satpol PP (Eza Gionino). She ran as fast as she could.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 573
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Pesona Tompelmu Mengalihkan Duniaku
programme.desc: revolves around the life of a handsome guy named Afgan (Erdin Werdrayana). It is told that Afgan is a playboy, who easily hurts the hearts of girls. He visits from one girl to another, even though Afgan's friends have warned him, but Afgan still refuses. Until suddenly Afgan got karma or curse, in the form of tompel that adorns his face. Afgan was cursed with tompel, because he had hurt the hearts of many women.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 68
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: WASIAT EYANG BIKIN BAPER SO HARD
programme.desc: Dito accidentally met Ajeng, who was on her way to Jakarta to look for work. Feeling sorry for her, Dito ended up hiring Ajeng as a domestic helper and to take care of his grandmother at home.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 120

programme.title: Gini Amat Ya Cari Jodoh
programme.desc: Dea (Shanice Margaretha) was going about her business with her partner. At that time, Dea suddenly took over the parking lot that was being headed by Alex (Erdin Werdrayana). Dea and Alex had a fight, because he already felt victorious in getting an empty parking lot, but instead it was taken over by Dea. But as it turned out, Dea and Alex had to work together.

programme.title: TELOLET CINTA DI ANGKOT NO 28
programme.desc: Ridwan (Naufal Samudra) is the lead singer of the band Rocker. Ridwan left home because he didn't want his mother to arrange his marriage. Ridwan also ran away from debt collectors and went to a village. One day, Ridwan disguised himself as Rimba and met Anty (Yuki Kato), a girl with a free-spirited lifestyle. Ridwan worked as a driver for Abah Bahri's minibus and lived with him, coincidentally Abah Bahri was Anty's father.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 121
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Jetset Kadang Bikin Wah Kadang Hah
programme.desc: One day, Alexa (Nabila Zavira) meets Darman (Erdin Werdrayana). Because she felt comfortable, Alexa complained about her father's lack of attention. Darman also complained about his family's economic condition which was in shortage and desperately needed money. Suddenly Alexa has an idea for Darman to kidnap Alexa and ask her father for ransom.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 575

programme.title: Yem Rempit - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah sitcom mengisahkan kehidupan Yem membahagikan masa antara isteri, mertua, kerjaya dan juga rakan-rakan. Semuanya dilakonkan di restoran bapa mertuanya.

programme.title: Pecah Perut - EP 13
programme.desc: Sebuah program sketsa komedi yang menampilkan barisan pelawak dan pelakon popular seperti Kamal Adli, Sherry Al-Hadad, Shahrul Shiro, Mamak Puteh dan ramai lagi

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 17

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 6

programme.title: Chien De La Casse
programme.desc: Childhood friends Dog, the quiet one, and Mirales, the flamboyant one, ward off boredom by roaming the streets in their little village in the south of France. One day, Elsa moves into the village. Dog falls in love and Mirales can't stand it.

programme.title: Itineraires Paysans - EP 1
programme.desc: The different attitudes and approaches of French farmers in terms of the environment, economy and landscape. A practical way of understanding a region and its terroir through their working practices.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 17
programme.desc: Loic has got it into his head that it would be a good idea to introduce Rosalie's sister to Nick, but the latter is dead against it. Pascale and Lea, however, think it's a great suggestion.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 18
programme.desc: Nick has to decide what he wants to do when he's older and contacts Andy to find out more about being an artist. He discovers him in a terrible state after his break-up with Pascale.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 19
programme.desc: Fred can't take part in the school talent show because she'd left it too late and the inscriptions have closed. Pascale is outraged and contacts the headmaster.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque ! - EP 20
programme.desc: Loic learns that Rosalie's father wants to meet him but he's too stressed-out to agree. When he goes to the pizzeria to ask Nick for his advice who should he cross but his step-father...

programme.title: Maghreb-Orient Express - EP 18
programme.desc: What's new in the Arab worlds? Journalist Mohamed Kaci hosts those making the cultural headlines in Tunis, Algiers, Rabat, Beirut, Alexandria, Dubai...

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Au Bout De L'enquete, La Fin Du Crime Parfait ? - EP 9
programme.desc: They are all cases that were closed, considered unsolvable, sometimes resisting police efforts for decades until a forgotten clue, an unhoped-for witness or a forensic innovation finally made it possible to unmask the culprit. Alongside Marie Drucker, the criminologist Alain Bauer explains the technical, psychological, sociological or historical elements involved.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes - EP 5
programme.desc: In Calvados, Syra and Bernard chose to change their lives to start organic market gardening. They grow vegetables while preserving the soil and biodiversity. Part of the production is processed on site and sold directly.

programme.title: Littoral - EP 1
programme.desc: In February 2022, Hermine and Sasha move into their new home in Lorient. But not only are they going to share the same house, but they'll also be sharing the same project: participating in the Mini Transat. A single-handed transatlantic race where the only thing that's ''mini'' is the name!

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut - EP 10
programme.desc: Les Contamines, on the south-western slopes of the Mont Blanc Massif, is home to Europe's highest nature reserve. Laurent Guillaume and the local ranger Geoffrey Garcel, head off for an autumnal hike through the heart of the Montjoie Valley.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1762
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 10
programme.desc: In Montreux, we visit a magnificent villa on the lake. In Jurg Duchilio's home, every inch of the house is decorated with mosaics, stones and lots of paint - a home decorated in Tuscan style.

programme.title: Curieux Begin - EP 8
programme.desc: Christian delves into the world of culinary competition. Chefs Samuel Sirois and Gilles Herzog, Canada's representatives at Bocuse d'Or, share their Olympic-level experience, joined by Hugo Duchesne, Quebec's top sommelier of 2020.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 19
programme.desc: The best of the season with Dior, Charles de Vilmorin, Schiaparelli, Iris Van Herpen, Chanel, Stephane Rolland, Julien Fournier, and Jean Paul Gaultier. Four designers stand out: Mohammed Ashi, Sara Chraibi, Rahul Mishra, and Adeline Andre. Male fashion with Pharrell Williams for Louis Vuitton, Kim Jones for Dior and EgonLab.

programme.title: 6h Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 25
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek - EP 12
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 3
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 31
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard - EP 32
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 4
programme.desc: In the intimacy of the on-going work to transform Le Volcan, the city of Le Havre's national stage, through the eye of photographer Olivier Roche.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil - EP 1763

programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Ne Me Liberez Pas, Je M'en Charge
programme.desc: A former hold-up man, Michel Vaujour has spent 27 years behind bars, 17 of them in solitary confinement. Longing for freedom, he has made five spectacular escapes. While this tumultuous lifestyle has often exposed him to the worst situations, it has also put him face to face with himself...

programme.title: En Voiture Clara
programme.desc: Clara is 17 years old today. As part of a surprise and to create a diversion, her father, Gilles, takes her to a deserted parking lot for a driving lesson. Nothing will go as planned.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 1
programme.desc: In Toulon, Jimmy's body is found hanging in his saloon-restaurant, dressed in full cowboy regalia. Clearly a murder disguised as suicide, Marianne's team investigate the world of country dance and western riding enthusiasts. Everyone seems to have adored Jimmy, and yet, several suspects quickly stand out from the crowd.

programme.title: Marianne - EP 2
programme.desc: An experienced HGV driver is found dead, crushed by the wheels of his lorry. An investigation that immerses Marianne and her team in the world of the long-distance lorry drivers.

programme.title: Le Dessous Des Cartes - EP 17
programme.desc: Since 24 February 2022, in violation of international law, Russia has been striking Ukraine's vital infrastructures. The objective: to exhaust the population. More than 9.5 million Ukrainians have thus been forced to leave their homes, most of them women and children. How do they resist?

programme.title: Bellefond - Le Prix De La Vie - EP 5
programme.desc: Casal, a young man accused of a murder he did not commit, escapes from prison and seeks out Bellefond to defend him. Bellefond will therefore have to face Colignon, Casal's former lawyer, who cannot bear to be dethroned by another.

programme.title: Le Grand Jt Des Territoires
programme.desc: Up-to-date news from the French regions presented by Cyril Viguier.

programme.title: Costa Rica, Le Royaume Des Colibris
programme.desc: Between the Pacific Ocean and the Atlantic Ocean, Costa Rica is a paradise for biodiversity. A quarter of its territory is protected to host 6% of the planet's species. Meeting the hummingbird, the raccoon, the golden orb-weaver spider, the white-nosed coati, or the quetzal...

programme.title: C'est Succulent ! - EP 16
programme.desc: This week, Leila Albert welcomes Rosine Binder from Alsace who loves her region, into her kitchen. She concocts a traditional recipe that she inherited from her mother: griesknepfle, or semolina cakes, and a savoury gratin with tomato sauce.

programme.title: Echappees Belles - EP 16
programme.desc: With 7.5 million inhabitants over 1,114 km², Hong Kong is among the most densely populated territories in the world. A former British colony, now a Special Administrative Region of China, this cosmopolitan city is a global financial hub where technological innovation is omnipresent. Yet, the city still preserves a rich cultural heritage...

programme.title: Movie - Maaveeran
programme.desc: After an accident, a timid cartoonist begins to hear the voice of a comic character he had created. Guided by this voice, he takes a stand against a group of evil men.

programme.title: Movie - Kanden Seethaiyai
programme.desc: Surendra marries Savitri, an orphan. He meets with an accident and a huge amount is needed to undergo the operation, so Savitri decides to become a surrogate mother to earn money.

programme.title: Movie - Pattikattu Thambi
programme.desc: This movie stars Arjun, Nirosha, S.S. Chandran and Rajesh, and is directed by Senthilnathan.

programme.title: Movie - Singara Chittu
programme.desc: Murali marries Raji against the wishes of his mother. Worsening conditions force him to move out with his wife and kid. All plans to begin life anew come to a halt due to an unexpected turn of events.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Jai Hind
programme.desc: After his brother is killed in a terrorist attack, Bharath, a policeman, assures his mother that he will resign. However, when he learns of a secret terrorist organisation, he sets out to capture them.

programme.title: Movie - Adaikalam
programme.desc: A father has to suffer the humiliation of being away from his children and eventually being an object of their anger. But this changes once the children discover the truth about their father.

programme.title: Movie - Sakalakala Vallavan
programme.desc: Kamal's sister is raped by the village head's son when the former refuses to abide by his dictatorship. Kamal vows to seek revenge and get his sister married to her rapist.

programme.title: Movie - Ethirum Puthirum
programme.desc: An honest district collector is accused of being linked with a terrorist organisation when he rebels against the police who have been trying to nab Arasappan, terrorist Veeraiyan's brother.

programme.title: Movie - Meendum Amman
programme.desc: Rajeshwari, a devotee of Goddess Akkamma, must fight Karkotakudu, a monster, after he tries to destroy Earth while taking control of everyone on the planet.

programme.title: Movie - Raja Nadai
programme.desc: Vijayakanth, a CID officer, is married to Seetha, who suffers from blood cancer but hides it from her husband. When she gets killed by a criminal, Vijayakanth sets out to capture him.

programme.title: PL REWIND - EP 15
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 20
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 29
programme.desc: A firm favourite at Brighton and Hove Albion, Yankuba Minteh sits down with PL Stories and opens up on his journey from the streets of The Gambia to the pinnacle of the Premier League. We travel to his hometown to meet his parents and those who first recognised his talent, uncovering the roots of his relentless drive and humility. A story of resilience and rapid ascent, uncovering the challenges he's overcome, and the pride he carries for his home nation.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 21
programme.desc: We follow the rise of one of Italy's most gifted midfielders and his journey to Premier League stardom at Newcastle United, Sandro Tonali. From his early days at Brescia, where his talent drew comparisons to Italian greats, to his development at AC Milan and eventual move to St. James' Park, we trace Tonali's evolution on and off the pitch.

programme.title: FS MMA Micahel Patt vs. Kaream Ellington
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Michael Patt takes time away from studying for his MBA to take on a dangerous wrestler and Muay Thai practicioner Kaream Ellington in Costa Rica.

programme.title: WCCB Rolando Romero vs. Anthony Yigit
programme.desc: Rolly takes on Anthony Yigit of Sweden at the AT&T Center in San Antonio on the undercard of the Jermell Charlo/Brian Castano contest. Rolly comes into this bout with an undefeated 13-0 record, while Yigit is 24-1-1, having won three straight bouts after his first career loss to Ivan Baranchyk. Watch Rolly Romero vs. Anthony Yigit, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: Greatest Classics Hector Camacho vs. Tony Menefee
programme.desc: Hector "Macho" Camacho, always entertaining and flamboyant, stepping into the ring with 62-4 Tony Menefee in Lincoln, Nebraska. Camacho was on the comeback trail, following an up and down year that saw him defeat the legendary Sugar Ray Leonard by TKO before dropping a unanimous decision to Oscar De La Hoya for the WBC Welterweight Title. With his eyes on another title shot he faces Menefee, in the midst of a 14-fight win streak.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Canelo Alvarez vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Canelo Alvarez taking on Kermit Cintron in a bout that helped elevate Alvarez into the light middleweight title picture and take another step towards becoming one of the biggest names in boxing. Also on the card, action from a classic battle between Joel Casamayor and Michael Katsidis for the WBO Lightweight title.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Mitakeumi, Ryuden, Kotoshogiku and Takarafuji from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Prix from Antalya, speak with Lukas Krpalek about his move to +100 kg weight class, and get a demonstration on how to preform the popular ride and roll counter attack.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.title: WCCB Otto Wallin vs. Gianluca Mandras
programme.desc: Italian champ Gianluca Mandras (12-4, 5 KOs) battles 26-year-old Swedish southpaw Otto Wallin (17-0, 11 KOs) for the WBA Continental Heavyweight Championship in Wallin's hometown of Sundsvall in the city's premiere professional boxing event. Wallin expects to seize the title, while Mandras plans to spoil Wallin's homecoming celebration at the Sporthallen arena.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Deandre Latimore vs. Carlos Quintana
programme.desc: This episode features Carlos Quintana's penultimate bout, as he fights Deandre Latimore, in a light middleweight title contest, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams (II)
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the second encounter between middleweights Paul Williams and Sergio Martinez. This time around, championship gold is on the line in a bout that will not go the distance. Also on the card, Marcos Maidana tries to jump up a weight class.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a welterweight world championship contest featuring Arturo Gatti and Carlos Baldomir. Baldomir looks to continue his rise in the welterweight ranks. Also on the card, a classic welterweight title brawl between Andre Berto and Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo

programme.title: Wide World of Fights James Kirkland vs. Alfredo Angulo
programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 111
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dispy, Laa-Laa and Po have their favourite things. The bag, the hat, the scooter and the ball all magically swap places and become mixed up.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'moon' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! Before we say good night to the moon, we see a bright moon, a light moon and even a tickly moon!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: It's the OKIDO circus today, and Messy is worried about performing his triple flip. Will his friends be able to help him conquer his tummy flutters before the audience arrives?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo have to carry Jackson's big blue 'chicken' Ludwig (who definitely isn't a chicken) to the country fair. But the easily-startled bird gets away from them - the chase is on!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 16
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Spring has sprung! There are cute baby animals to meet and frolic with.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 38
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch is invited to Djenne in Mali, Africa, to visit the people and to see one of his favourite things at work - mud.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: It's lunchtime on Bluey's deck! But the BBQ needs a salad, so Bingo's relaxing sit-down will have to wait until she finds every colour of capsicum her cousins asked for!

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Andy's Global Adventures (S1) - EP 25
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head to the Amazon on a global adventure to discover how scarlet macaw chicks get the vital salt in their diet they need to survive.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Bella and Lift visit the Fortress of Fun, where Kingsley and Queenie have fun looking for peas with the Playtimers in their Pea Party game.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 23
programme.desc: The Squirrels become enchanted when they hear a piece of music from Duggee's choir. They quickly learn what makes a choir.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 22
programme.desc: The Squirrels notice that Happy isn't acting like his normal self, and he's strangely wearing new trainers. Happy doesn't know what he's feeling, and his friends want to help him.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 21
programme.desc: After finding out that Mr Wobbly is visiting next Monday, the Squirrels impatiently want to know how long that means they need to wait.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S1) - EP 43
programme.desc: A game of hide and seek threatens to topple the fairy chimneys of Cappadocia in Turkey.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S1) - EP 42
programme.desc: The Go Jetters spring into action when Glitch's mini-master toys invade Hong Kong Harbour.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 1
programme.desc: Emily worries that she doesn't have a best friend. Soon she realises she's been surrounded by best friends all along.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: Duck is bored of his toy collection, so he and Sarah search for old toys in the attic.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 47
programme.desc: Benjamin and Sophie have a new bug friend. Stanley helps build a bug feeder which attracts lots more bugs. They eat so much; Stanley gets more food and builds a Bug Hotel for them.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 46
programme.desc: Fred, Fifi and Ari call Stanley to help them with their recycling drive by coming up with a way of repurposing all the towns' old stuff. Stanley makes a crazy golf course!

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 20
programme.desc: Dad is in the kitchen cooking dinner. Rio asks if she can help make dessert, which is trifle. But Rio gets confused, as some of the stew ingredients are mixed in with the trifle ingredients.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Gran Gran's keys get stuck behind the sofa. Inspired by inventors from the past, JoJo and Gran Gran invent a 'key collector' to get them back!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 5
programme.desc: Dad pretends he was born yesterday. Bluey and Bingo have to guide him through his second day on Earth, especially when he discovers food is delicious and steals Lucky's Dad's pie.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini-Bluey!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Duggee's made some delicious pancakes, but the clubhouse is out of honey. Time for the bees to get busy!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Duggee has made a beautiful rock pool. The Squirrels spot the strangest things - dots with tails, wriggling around. What on earth are they? They are baby frogs - tadpoles!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 23
programme.desc: Grandmaster Glitch tries to rescue a Grimbot from an Atlantic hurricane. The Go Jetters have to rescue him!

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: It's wish-granter Mango, ready to make all the Roots and Fruits cast wishes come true.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 19

programme.desc: Police Officer Panda brings his twin daughters Peggi and Pandora Panda to playgroup for the first time.

programme.title: Peppa Pig S8 - EP 802
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle teaches the children about Chinese New Year and together they make a wonderful dragon costume..

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S9 - EP 907
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S2 - EP 211
programme.desc: With the other pups at parachute training, Marshall must get a group of loose kittens back all by himself. But he has the help of the other pups' packs! // Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a family of deer stuck on slippery ice!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S5 - EP 504
programme.desc: When Corny runs away from Farmer Al's Farm during a blackout, the pups need to light the way to get them home safely!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: When Jim is imprisoned in the Darklands, Blinky tries to decipher the Amulet to save him while Claire, Toby, and NotEnrique race to recover the Killahead Bridge before it's too late

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Toby gets secret transmissions through his headgear and his friends decide they need to infiltrate; meanwhile, Jim forms an unlikely alliance

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: Harold and George can't wait to spend the summer together at camp. But not so fast, boys -- your old nemesis Mr. Krupp has a most unpleasant surprise.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Kitty Ranger Team Leader Mama Box helps Kitty Ranger Gabby and Pandy get a lost Baby Me-Owl back home to its Mama in the Fairy Tale Garden. They embark on a hiking adventure! They learn about animal tracking, earn patches along the way, and ultimately, reunite Baby with Mama!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better - now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a suitcase and a hotel brochure, it’s time to take a trip to The Dollhouse Hotel! Hotel guests Gabby and Pandy check in with the Hotel Manager DJ Catnip then go to Mercat’s Spa and even order room service from Pillow Cat! For our Gabby Cat of the Day Segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Elephant had no nose. He couldn't swat away the flies, or scrub his belly… he couldn't even blow his nose. Then one day snappy Crocodile snapped! Crocodile pulled and he pulled and he pulled… until Ker-doing!!! Crocodile let go and Elephant's nose was all long and wiggly! And that's why Elephant has a trunk. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Snake did have legs… hundreds and hundreds of them. But poor old Snake had no eyes, not a single eye on his head. Then on the day of the great Tinga Tinga Festival of Colours Snake quite literally bumped into Millipede who was stuck in a hole. They decided to swap eyes and legs just for one day. So that Snake could see all the wonderful colours and Millipede could run all over Tinga Tinga.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is going to ban Flash from Silver hatch unless he learns how to do something useful. Can Flash learn how to be a good marshal in time?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hellie wants to be able to race like the cars. When he does join in he is accused of cheating. Hellie is upset and the cars annoyed… will they be able to make up before something disastrous happens?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Marsha decides to be a mechanic but wears Big Chris out with her endless questions. Disaster strikes when Chris dozes off and doesn't listen to her properly…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: The loudspeaker system is not working at Silver Hatch. How will Roary be stopped from performing a dangerous stunt on the track?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Big Chris has a clear out and takes all his old junk up to Farmer Green's car boot sale but misses the clutter in Rusty. How will he get everything back?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: Big Chris takes the cars to the beach to relax in the heat but he is so busy dealing with the cars he forgets to drink his water. But hang on, who else has drunk it…

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dak's lack of planning gets him, Cutter and Winger lost with Elbone in the Maze Caves, and Leyla's overthinking threatens the effort to rescue them.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The evil genius Karl sets out to destroy King Julien. When both Clover and Maurice are captured, King Julien must save them from his new nemesis.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Exhausted from settling his subjects' disputes, King Julien replaces himself with a dummy king so he can play hooky, unwittingly sparking a rebellion.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tag chooses to pair up with her Grandpaw for the Barker Family Talent Show, and together, they search for their winning talent. \ Tag is surprised to learn that today is the Pawston Snoozie-a-Hullabaloozie. With everything shut down for the day, Tag and Scooch take the opportunity to play all over town, while trying not to wake up other dogs.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Tag can't wait to show off her car at the car show. But when Cheddar Biscuit wants to come along and pick up her clown friends along the way, Tag is wary that Cheddar Biscuit will steal her thunder. \ The Not Yet Cadets can't wait to watch Sam’s big race. But when Sam loses his car key, he challenges the Not Yet Cadets to race around town to find it.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When the banana bread Harper leaves out for Eden is stolen, the Dew Drops create a sting operation to catch the thief. / When Captain Meow Meow gets a splinter in his paw and hears the word "vet," he flees. Now it's up to the Dew Drops to find Captain Meow Meow and get that splinter out.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Harper's drone flies away it’s up to the Dew Drops to get it back. And while Eden wishes she could fly like a drone, she learns that she can do great things with or without wings. / When Dylan loses his first tooth the Dew Drops learn that the Tooth Fairy will be coming and Athena tries so hard to make a good impression that she almost ruins Dylan's first lost tooth experience.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Eep has the first pen pal in Gulp Gorge/Gran sends Ugga and Eep on the first treasure hunt when she decides to pass on her inheritance

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as "quicktogramming"/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a "super bug"

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 65
programme.desc: Lured into an empty hotel where a baby has supposedly gone missing, the team is trapped by Crispin Biscuits, a chaotic British schoolboy baby who’s been hired to wreck Boss and Tina’s lives. Crispin puts the new company’s loyalty to a test in a series of fiendish puzzling mind games, all with the threat of constant balloon popping (horrible for baby ears!)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 66
programme.desc: Our team’s startup company and their rivals at Baby Corp get in a "Space Race", competing to see who can make the cutest kiddie-pretend "moon landing" for a baby - a spectacle sure to bring in a bounty of Baby Love. With both companies pouring their resources into a simulated space take off, tempers and sabotage are running hot, and the scrappy little startup is in danger of getting crushed by their big business competitor.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When George and Harold go back in time to stop the invention of homework, they realize they also eliminated the most important thing in the world: comic books

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Erica makes fun of George and Harold’s latest and greatest comic, they make a comic about her becoming a vampire

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When an alien beetle infestation threatens to expose their true identities, the Royals must depend on a new ally for help. Meanwhile, Zadra joins Morando’s army as a double agent who secretly spies on him for the growing Resistance.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Aja and Krel's search for parts to repair the Mothership leads them to Driver's Ed -- and a high speed run-in with the Zeron Brotherhood. Meanwhile, Zadra begins spying on Morando's sinister plans.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Stuck in a time-loop, Aja finds unlikely help from Jim Lake and Team Trollhunters. Meanwhile, a giant Troll rampages the Arcadia High Science Fair, threatening to expose both the Troll world and Aja and Krel’s alien secret.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 54
programme.desc: After Boss insults Tina's imaginary friend, he's forced into "Imaginary Friend Sensitivity Training" at Baby Corp. Boss makes up his own imaginary friend to get out of these meetings, but after Tina gets a whiff that he may be lying, he's forced to keep up the charade at work and at home.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 55
programme.desc: It's a turf war when Bounce House Bruiser Baby encroaches on Delivery Baby's tricycle park! Tina attempts to befriend Bruiser in order to woo her back to the bounce house, but naughty behavior is the only language Bruiser understands. Determined to win this kid over, Tina ends up going rogue as a trike hoodlum, and her own field team is forced to reign her in.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 56
programme.desc: Boss takes an overdue vacation day, and ends up teaching Tabitha the value of "trading up" valueless objects into something she actually wants, an electric scooter. However, a 5%er baby is in trouble and BB's field team has "got it under control"… or do they? Boss tries to juggle his Tabitha lessons with sneaking peeks at the mission in progress

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Pony Tales S3 - EP 57
programme.desc: After finding a majestic horse in the wild, Lucky and the girls set out to solve the mystery of where she came from -- and where she truly belongs.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 60
programme.desc: With academy life on the horizon, the PALs work together to tame wild yearling Governor before they leave. But maybe he's not meant to be broken.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 61
programme.desc: Lucky doesn't want her friends to miss their favorite Miradero traditions while they're away at school. So why not celebrate them all in one day?

programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as "quicktogramming"/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a "super bug"

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Dagur the Deranged captures Gustav, it's up to Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders to get him back.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Blinky, Toby and Claire make a dangerous trade with the Janus Order while Gunmar sets Jim up in a battle to the death

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hippo did have hair… lots of hair! She was always harumphingly hot. Then one hot night while Hippo was sleeping a spark from the fire caught the end of her hairy tail! Hippo was on fire! She ran through the bush until SPLOSH! Hippo jumped in the waterhole. And from that day on Hippo stayed in the cool waters without a single hair on her hide. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Tortoise's shell was all shiny and smooth. One day Tortoise discovered the birds were having a Feast in the Heavens and he tricked the Birds into making him a pair of wings. Greedy Tortoise raced the birds beyond the clouds and scoffed the whole feastt! When the Birds found out Tortoise had to jump off a cloud until BOOF!!! He landed on his shiny shell.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 7
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with the cars running amok on his track and summons Bill and Nick to restore order to the track. But might our overzealous policeman overstep the mark?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 8
programme.desc: Flash invites everyone to a tea party, thinking they bring the food with them. Are there going to be a lot of hungry bunnies at Silver hatch?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Farmer Green tells the cars about olden days, when the only transport was horse and cart. Maxi and Drifter say they would never be seen travelling that slow… or would they?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: FB is excited about his sleepover with the other cars in the workshop but when the night draws in he is unsure of his unfamiliar surroundings. Big Chris helps set him at his ease

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor has asked CiCi to perform one of her stunts in front of a big crowd. CiCi is very nervous and Roary does his best to help his friend prepare for the event.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Big Chris is feeling ill so Marsha sends him to bed until he is better. Big Chris enjoys the attention rather too much and fails to let everyone know when he is on the mend.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Set on reclaiming his throne, Uncle King Julien convinces Julien to go into Foosa territory. Julien creates a disguise and forces Maurice to join him.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Clover is forced to take a vacation, and while she's away, she meets the handsome and free-spirited Sage Moondancer.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: A run-of-the-mill arts and crafts session turns into an interdimensional adventure from which Harold, George and company may never return.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Krupp's campers take on rich rivals in a hoity-toity boat race that also features a revenge-obsessed giant salamander. Paging Captain Underpants!

programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Tag discovers that Scooch is a great baker, she encourages him to start a pupcake stand. But when Tag rounds up more customers than Scooch is prepared to handle, Scooch can’t keep up with the demand. \ Tag and Scooch’s race to pick up the most trash on Pawston Beach is thwarted by Frank and Beans, who just want to make more of a mess.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: It's Ball-entine’s Day, the day when the dogs of Pawston show their affection for each other by exchanging balls. But unfortunately, the town is fresh out, so Tag and Scooch set sail for Ball Island. \ If Tag and Scooch want to leave Ball Island with the balls they chose for their family, they must earn them by proving themselves ball-worthy, through a series of challenges from The Fetcher.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Marcus brings home the class tree sapling for the weekend, the Dew Drops see it starting to wilt and must cheer the sapling up, so Marcus can make sure to plant it for his class. / When Athena accidentally breaks Lola's nature sculpture, the Dew Drops must go on a scavenger hunt to replace the missing pieces.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Lola, Dylan and Cassie have tickets to the carnival, but when Dylan loses his ticket, the Dew Drops set out to find it. / When Phoebe accidentally gets tossed into Nicholas' diaper bag before a trip to the park, Phoebe has to help a baby bird, while Eden and Athena must help Marcus rehearse for his big concert.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Donna decides to show off her not-so-flashy skills as a magician at the Community Center talent show, the Zenkos must do everything they can to save her act from becoming an embarrassing disaster. / After Sam’s favorite skateboard accidentally gets put in with donations Mr. Tanaka is collecting for a fundraiser, the team is led on a merry chase as the skateboard passes from one Harmony Harbor denizen to another.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Little Lula has set up a lemonade stand, but she’s not getting any business. The Zenkos swing into action to send customers her way. / When Donna, Fawna and Rona have a spat, the triplets’ longstanding annual tradition of viewing a comet together is in jeopardy. Now it’s up to Team Zenko to get the three feuding sisters back together again before the comet streaks by.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a new camera that takes pictures with silly filters, CatRat uses it to lead Gabby, Pandy, and the Gabby Cats on a photographic scavenger hunt around the dollhouse!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes masks and capes for her and Pandy, they become the dollhouse defenders and must save the Gabby Cats from Bad Guy CatRat! In the Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song about her garden magic!

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan's plans to create an open-plan living and dining room are jeopardised when they come up against a huge structural wall dividing the two spaces.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: Alan and Amanda are on the home stretch as they take on the interiors for the final room and reveal their labour of love to their Sicilian family with an emotional farewell party.

programme.title: Big Zuu & AJ Tracey's Rich Flavours (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Up in Bonnie Scotland, Zuu and AJ head to the luxury 'old money' estates of the rich and high society. They eat the most expensive haggis in the world (coming in at £4000), sample scotch whiskey, ride carriages, go fishing and hunting, before putting their own spin on classic Scottish cuisine.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 1
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers - EP 2
programme.desc: "Money Movers" provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day’s early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. "Money Movers" anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 1
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: Access Middle East - EP 2
programme.desc: Access Middle East is your window into Middle East power, money, and influence. With exclusive interviews and high-level analysis, the program brings viewers closer to the decision-makers deploying capital and driving innovation in one of the world’s most dynamic regions.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 33
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 1
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition - EP 2
programme.desc: Start your trading day with Europe Early Edition as European financial centres take the reins of global markets. With breaking news, key earnings and data, as well as interviews with market makers and C-Suite executives from across the globe, Europe Early Edition is essential viewing to be prepared for the day’s session.

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe - EP 1
programme.desc: It’s one hour until the opening bell in Europe and Squawk Box Europe has everything you need to prepare for the first trade. Steve Sedgwick, Karen Tso and Julianna Tatelbaum take on the most complex stories of the day with instant analysis on how you can make your money work around the news.

programme.title: Worldwide Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: Broadcast from CNBC Global Headquarters in Englewood Cliffs, N.J., CNBC’s "Worldwide Exchange" delivers essential, actionable information and analysis for anyone who wants to be part of the global business conversation. Anchored by Morgan Brennan, the program prepares CNBC’s worldwide audience with a smart take on overnight U.S. news and live international market action.

programme.title: US Squawk Box - EP 1
programme.desc: "Squawk Box" is the ultimate pre-market morning news and talk program, where the biggest names in business and politics tell their most important stories. Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. programme.title: Africa Live

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Sports Scene
programme.desc: Sports Scene brings you closer to all the action from all corners of the world, with highlights from across Europe, North America and China's top sports leagues. programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Vibe
programme.desc: The Vibe is a 30-minute TV show that runs daily on weekdays on CGTN. programme.title: Africa Live
